regulatory_source: EPA FIFRA, State pesticide application laws
ai_system_prompt: You are an EPA pesticide/fertilizer compliance AI. Extract: product name, EPA registration number, quantity applied, dilution ratio, application method, target area/zone. Auto-log current weather conditions and timestamp. Return JSON: {product, epa_reg_number, qty, unit, dilution_ratio, method, zone, weather: {temp_f?, wind_mph?, humidity_pct?, precipitation?}, applied_at}
photo_analysis_prompt: Analyze this landscaping/property photo. Identify: irrigation system components and their condition, plant health indicators (yellowing, wilting, disease), chemical application equipment present. Return JSON: {irrigation: {components_visible: [], condition: 'good'|'fair'|'poor'}, plant_health: [{plant_type, condition, issues: []}], equipment: [], compliance_concerns: []}

required_daily_checks.label: All chemical applications logged with EPA reg number
